info.title: igloo15.ChangelogGenerator.Tool
info.description: dotnet cli tool used to generate a changelog

options.name: --make-config
options.description:
(Default: false) Makes a changelog file in the current
directory

options.name: --config
options.description:
(Default: changelog.json) Location of the changelog
file

options.name: --test
options.description:
(Default: false) Used to test the creation of
changelog file

options.name: --next-version
options.description:
The name of the next version to be released. This
should be used when creating changelog for next
version to be released.

options.name: --repo-location
options.description: The location of the repo to generate a changelog from
